title: Multi-component engine cover
abstract: A multi-component engine cover for covering an engine of a vehicle includes an inner surface positioned adjacent to the engine and an outer surface opposite the inner surface. The inner surface of the multi-component engine cover includes a heat resistant insert comprising a melamine foam. In addition, the multi-component engine cover includes an overlay coupled to the heat resistant insert and defining the outer surface of the cover. The overlay comprises polyurethane or, in certain instances, a polyurethane foam. The heat resistant insert is adapted to withstand a temperature greater than a heat degradation temperature of the overlay but less than a heat degradation temperature of the melamine foam during operation of the engine of the vehicle.
claims:
Claims What is claimed is: 1. A multi-component engine cover for covering an engine of a vehicle, said multi-component engine cover comprising: an inner surface positioned adjacent to the engine and an outer surface opposite said inner surface, said inner surface including a heat resistant insert comprising a melamine foam; and an overlay coupled to said heat resistant insert and defining said outer surface, said overlay comprising polyurethane. 2. The multi-component engine cover according to claim 1, wherein said heat resistant insert is adapted to withstand a temperature greater than a heat degradation temperature of said overlay but less than a heat degradation temperature of said melamine foam during operation of the engine of the vehicle. 3. The multi-component engine cover according to claim 1 or claim 2, wherein said overlay extends along said inner surface. 4. The multi-component engine cover according to claim 3, wherein said heat resistant insert comprises at least two heat resistant inserts, and wherein each respective one of said at least two heat resistant inserts are separated along said inner surface by said overlay. 5. The multi-component engine cover according to any one preceding claim, wherein said melamine foam comprises a formaldehyde- melamine- sodium bisulfite copolymer. 6. The multi-component engine cover according any one preceding claim, wherein said overlay is formed as the reaction product of an isocyanate-reactive component and an isocyanate-component, wherein said isocyanate-reactive component comprises a hydroxyl-functional polyether. 7. The multi-component engine cover according to claim 6, wherein said isocyanate-reactive component further comprises a styrene- acrylonitrile graft polyol. 8. The multi-component engine cover according to claim 6 or 7, wherein said isocyanate component comprises methylene diphenyl diisocyanate (MDI). 9. The multi-component engine cover according to any one of claims 6 to 8, wherein said hydroxyl- functional polyether comprises a polyether triol having ethylene oxide-based terminal groups. 10. The multi-component engine cover according to any one preceding claim, wherein the overlay comprises a polyurethane foam. 11. The multi-component engine cover according to any one preceding claim, wherein the tensile strength of the multi-component engine cover, measured in accordance with ASTM D3574, is greater than or equal to 150 kPa. 12. The multi-component engine cover according to any one preceding claim, wherein the tear strength of the multi-component engine cover, measured in accordance with ASTM D3574, is greater than or equal to 350 N/m. 13. The multi-component engine cover according to any one preceding claim, wherein the elongation of the multi-component engine cover, measured in accordance with ASTM D3574, is greater than or equal to 60%. 14. A vehicle comprising: an engine; and a multi-component engine cover according to any one of claims 1 to 13 coupled to the engine such that said inner surface is positioned adjacent to the engine. 15. A method for forming a multi-component engine cover for covering an engine of a vehicle, the multi-component engine cover including an inner surface positioned adjacent to the engine and an outer surface opposite the inner surface, said method comprising: providing a mold including an inner cavity surface and an outer cavity surface defining a cavity, the cavity shaped to correspond to the shape of the multi-component engine cover; introducing a heat resistant insert within the cavity of the mold in a position adjacent to the inner cavity surface, the heat resistant insert comprising a melamine foam; and forming the multi-component engine cover by reacting an isocyanate- reactive component with an isocyanate component within the remaining portion of the cavity of the mold to form a overlay which is coupled to the heat resistant insert, wherein the isocyanate-reactive component comprises a hydroxyl-functional polyether and wherein the formed overlay is adjacent to the outer cavity surface; and removing the formed multi-component engine cover from the mold. 16. The method according to claim 15, wherein the formed overlay is also adjacent to the inner cavity surface prior to the step of removing the formed multi-component engine cover from the mold. 17. The method according to claim 16, wherein the step of introducing a heat resistant insert within the cavity of the mold comprises introducing at least two heat resistant inserts within the cavity of the mold along the inner cavity surface, wherein each one of the at least two heat resistant inserts is separated from a respective another one of the at least two heat resistant inserts along the inner cavity surface. 18. The method according to any one of claims 15 to 17, wherein the step of forming the multi-component engine cover comprising forming the multi-component engine cover by reacting an isocyanate-reactive component with an isocyanate component in the presence of a blowing agent within the 

 remaining portion of the cavity of the mold to form a foam overlay which is coupled to the heat resistant insert, wherein the isocyanate-reactive component comprises a hydroxyl-functional polyether and wherein the formed foam overlay is adjacent to the outer cavity surface. 19. A multi-component engine cover formed by the method of any one of claims 15 to 18.
